input: anonymous session sequences (user-item interactions within a session)
output: next item prediction (ranked list of items)
backbone: multi-view graph neural network (GNN) with session graph, global item graph, global category graph
loss: contrastive loss (InfoNCE) + cross-entropy loss for next item prediction
key_idea: construct three graph views (session, global item, global category) and apply contrastive learning to enhance embeddings and reduce noise
